subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! The servant doth acknowledge Thy loftiness and exaltation, Thy power and Thy oneness, Thy singleness and Thy sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اعترف الخادم بعلوک و سموک و اقتدارک و توحیدک و تفریدک و اختیارک و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
